title: Technology Gone Wild
summary: Nick Jans has observed a new breed of wilderness traveler, one that relies on technology he couldn't dream of 40 years ago. The post Technology Gone Wild appeared first on Alaska Magazine .

title: NANA Board Approves Funds for Deering, Ambler and Kobuk Infrastructure Projects
summary: The vision of the Village Economic Investment (VEI) committee, comprised of NANA board members, is to create a thriving regional economy. Its mission is to achieve sustainable villages through partnerships. The VEI fund allocates millions of dollars to communities to implement economic and infrastru...
